features.name: Starting features documentation
features.description: Document why and how the harness implementation works in a docs/ folder and keep the README focused on usage.
features.evidence: docs/README.md and docs/implementation.md added; README links to docs/. git diff --check passed for documentation and harness files.

features.name: Harness lifecycle files
features.description: Add minimal state, verification, and handoff files so future agent sessions can restart reliably.
features.evidence: feature_list.json, progress.md, init.sh, and session-handoff.md added. harness-creator validation reports 100/100.

features.name: Final verification
features.description: Run focused validation for the documentation and harness files before marking the branch ready.
features.evidence: Ran node templates/.claude/skills/harness-creator/scripts/validate-harness.mjs --target . and git diff --check -- README.md AGENTS.md docs/README.md docs/implementation.md feature_list.json progress.md init.sh session-handoff.md.

features.name: skogharness harness-init command
features.description: Add a first-class `skogharness harness-init [dir]` CLI command that scaffolds feature_list.json, progress.md, session-handoff.md, and a project-specific init.sh from the harness-creator templates, since this repo's own product is a harness installer.
features.evidence: src/commands/harness-init.js added; wired into bin/cli.js and src/index.js. bun run lint clean, bun test 46/46 pass. Squash-merged to master as 8a68ae8 feat: add harness startup scaffold, alongside feat-001..003.

features.name: Full-repo verification after merge
features.description: Run the complete verification suite (not just docs-scoped checks) once the code and docs/lifecycle changes from feat-001..004 were combined on master.
features.evidence: ./init.sh run from master (clean working tree): bun install (no changes), bun run lint clean, bun test 46/46 pass, harness-creator validate-harness.mjs 100/100 across all five subsystems.

features.name: Harness blueprint documentation
features.description: Produce a Claude Code harness-style blueprint for the skogharness agentic system.
features.evidence: docs/harness-blueprint.md created/refined using the claude-code-harness blueprint contract. Focused verification: git diff --check -- docs/harness-blueprint.md passed.

features.name: Session hooks verification spec and plan
features.description: Write the Superpowers design spec and implementation plan for startup context injection and stop-time verification.
features.evidence: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-08-session-hooks-verification-design.md and docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-08-session-hooks-verification.md created. Focused verification: feature_list.json parsed, placeholder scan clean, git diff --check passed for tracked state files, and --no-index/content whitespace scans passed for new spec/plan files.

features.name: Skill registry uniqueness guard
features.description: Fix duplicated skill registrations so generated Codex target installs each skill once, and add a test that rejects duplicate registered skill ids.
features.evidence: Removed duplicate harness-creator and toon-formatter rows from src/profiles.js, added registered skill ids are unique coverage in test/skill-quality.test.js. bun run test passed 47/47; bun run lint passed; ./init.sh passed with harness validation 100/100.

features.name: Runnable sync guidance and harness meta profile
features.description: Replace broken npm-registry npx guidance with a runnable GitHub-backed command and add a harness-meta profile for self-hosting SkogAI/harness repositories.
features.evidence: Verified npx skogharness@latest sync fails with npm 404; verified npx --yes github:skogai/harness --help works; verified npx --yes --package . harness sync against a temp skogai.json works with profile harness-meta. npm test passed 47/47; git diff --check passed; node bin/cli.js status . reports Claude Code and Codex in sync.

features.name: Documentation currency map
features.description: Review README, AGENTS/CLAUDE guidance, docs/, generated agent files, and lifecycle state to classify what is current and in use, what is proposed/future, and what is stale or superseded.
features.evidence: Next planning step requested after generated harness sync outputs were merged and pushed.

features.name: Turn lifecycle contract
features.description: Define the harness turn model from incoming user message or lifecycle hook through context loading, feature selection, action, verification, evidence recording, and final initiative handoff.
features.evidence: Proposed after reframing ./init.sh from a branch/startup verifier into one command inside a per-message turn lifecycle.

features.name: Template script validator surface
features.description: Document and wire the existing templates/.claude/scripts validators into named project commands so profile consistency, reference neutrality, skill closure, skill language, plugin metadata, and skill quality checks are visible and reusable.
features.evidence: templates/.claude/scripts/*.py currently contains validators and tests, but they are not surfaced in README, docs, init.sh, or package scripts.

features.name: .skogai/ manifest schema
features.description: Intent: formalize skogai.json's contract mechanically (today validateManifest() in src/manifest.js hand-checks fields with no schema artifact) and extend it with the two fields the .skogai/ template work needs: state (boolean, derived or explicit) and templates (override map keyed by permalink). Needed input: current src/manifest.js (validateManifest, resolveManifest), current field set (version, targets, profile, skills, mcps, model). Expected output: a JSON Schema file (proposed: templates/skogai.schema.json) covering all current + new fields, plus a decision on whether validateManifest() delegates to it or is checked against it in tests.

features.name: .skogai/ functional contract
features.description: Intent: write down every function/CLI surface the harness exposes -- existing (init, sync/runSync, status/getStatus, addMcp/addSkill) and new (parseTemplate, resolveField, ACTIONS, deployTemplates) -- with explicit input/output types and side effects, before any engine code is implemented. Needed input: src/index.js current exports, sketched template-engine signatures, feat-013's schema (for manifest.templates typing). Expected output: a contract section (in docs/dot-skogai-templates.md or a dedicated docs/api-contract.md) listing, per function: signature, input shape, output shape, side effects (filesystem writes, symlinks -- no network).

features.name: Template object model & resolution engine
features.description: Intent: implement exactly the contract from feat-014, no more. Needed input: feat-013 (schema), feat-014 (contract). Expected output: src/utils/template.js with parseTemplate, resolveField (cascade: env var -> skogai.json -> template frontmatter -> hardcoded default), ACTIONS registry (copy, symlink); unit tests. No CLI wiring yet.

features.name: templates/ mirror + .skogai/ content + wiring; retire harness-init
features.description: Intent: ship the renamed template tree, the actual .skogai/ template files, and connect the engine into sync/init for the claude target only, replacing harness-init. Needed input: feat-015's engine. Expected output: git mv templates/codex templates/.codex, git mv templates/blocks templates/prompts; getAgentTemplateDir() (src/utils/copy.js) derives from AGENT_TARGETS[agent].outputDir (drops the claude special case); BLOCKS_DIR references updated in src/commands/sync.js; new templates/.skogai/{feature_list.json,progress.md,session-handoff.md,init.sh,QUESTIONS.list} with frontmatter, content ported from templates/.claude/skills/harness-creator/templates/* (left untouched there); resolveManifest() adds state: skills.includes('harness-creator'); runSync() calls deployTemplates() gated on plan.state + claude target; src/commands/harness-init.js deleted, its bin/cli.js registration and src/index.js export removed; new standalone `harness template deploy [dir]` CLI command.

features.name: Status drift detection + docs/test close-out for .skogai/
features.description: Intent: make .skogai/ state visible to harness status, and land the trailing docs/tests so the feature set is actually done, not just implemented. Needed input: feat-016's shipped state plane. Expected output: src/commands/status.js reports missing/drifted .skogai/ templates (mirrors existing missingSkills reporting); docs/features.md, docs/harness-blueprint.md, docs/specs.md updated; test/state-scaffold.test.js (or extended test/manifest-sync.test.js) covers create-if-missing, no-clobber-on-rerun, minimal profile creates no .skogai/, and status drift reporting.

features.name: templates/schemas/ domain schema family (agent, skill, manifest) + validator fixes
features.description: Intent: draft the concrete JSON Schema objects the .skogai/ engine will operate on, ahead of feat-013's formal manifest-schema work, and fix the pre-existing schema validator so it actually runs end to end. Needed input: existing .skogai/schemas/{document,defs,router}.schema.json (used as the house style/pattern to follow), src/agents.js (AGENT_TARGETS), src/profiles.js (SKILLS/profiles), src/mcps.js (MCP_CATALOG). Expected output: templates/schemas/agent.schema.json (plain domain object mirroring AGENT_TARGETS), templates/schemas/skill.schema.json (a document type built on document.schema.json, same allOf pattern as router.schema.json -- practice example, not yet wired to real SKILL.md frontmatter), templates/schemas/manifest.schema.json (the skogai.json contract: version/targets/profile/skills/mcps/model -- distinct from and narrower than feat-013's planned manifest schema, which still needs to add state/templates fields). Also fixed scripts/_validate_file.py (added PEP 723 inline deps so `uv run` provisions jsonschema/pyyaml without system pip; added missing "skill" -> skill.schema.json entry in TYPE_TO_SCHEMA; caught yaml.YAMLError in parse_frontmatter instead of an unhandled traceback) and scripts/validate-schema.sh (unguarded `result=$(...)` under `set -e` meant the first FAIL silently aborted the whole script before the summary printed -- added `|| true`).
features.evidence: ./scripts/validate-schema.sh ./templates run to completion (previously aborted silently before any summary printed): 11 checked, 0 passed, 2 failed, 8 warned -- failures/warnings are pre-existing content issues in templates/.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md (unquoted colons in descriptions; no `type:` field since skill.schema.json is a practice example not yet wired to real files), not regressions from this work. bun test: 47/47 pass. All templates/schemas/*.json confirmed valid JSON via `node -e "JSON.parse(...)"`.
